headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. Meanwhile, the Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell pitching 5 strong innings. The Detroit Tigers also secured a crucial win against the Toronto Blue Jays, 3-2, with Andrés Giménez collecting 1 hit and 2 RBI.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres, who is out with a right brachialis muscle injury. Other notable injuries include Blake Snell of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Chase Dollander of the Colorado Rockies, Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners, Jimmy Herget of the Colorado Rockies, Brooks Kriske of the Athletics, Robby Snelling of the Miami Marlins, and Francisco Alvarez of the New York Mets.

The Baltimore Orioles made a significant trade, acquiring right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded left-handed pitcher José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. Additionally, the Arizona Diamondbacks acquired outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Victory Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, winning 11-9. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a crucial win. Zack Littell led the Nationals to victory with 5.0 strong innings, striking out 3 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested matchup. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win against the Cleveland Guardians, with a final score of 7-6. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Waldron on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-hander Matt Waldron has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez in a trade with the Athletics, who received cash in return.
